seoTitle: Sunderland Bay vs Sunshine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunderland Bay and Sunshine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sunderland Bay vs Sunshine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunderland Bay and Sunshine.
heading: Sunderland Bay vs Sunshine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunderland Bay, Victoria and Sunshine, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunderland Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Sunshine (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunderland Bay or Sunshine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunderland Bay has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Sunshine scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunderland Bay scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Sunshine scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunderland Bay or Sunshine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunderland Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
